name: SECeDGE
description: SECeDGE — AI platform for analyzing SEC filings and financial disclosures using NLP and LLM extraction.

seo.title: SECeDGE — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: SECeDGE: SECeDGE — AI platform for analyzing SEC filings and financial disclosures using NLP and LLM extraction.

when_to_use: Running AI-powered security content analysis for compliance
Detecting sensitive or confidential data in outbound content
Building data loss prevention workflows for enterprise content
Monitoring AI-generated content for security policy violations

pros: NLP and LLM extraction on 10-K/10-Q tables
cons: Narrow to US SEC — no global disclosures
LLM extraction still needs audit review
review.verdict: Solid vertical AI for equity analysts drowning in 10-Ks, but too niche for generalists.
review.best_for: Equity analysts and compliance teams working with US SEC filings daily
review.not_for: Teams needing global filings, general-purpose NLP, or non-financial documents

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Unknown pricing; default FALSE per rules
